title: Recovery of answers for end users upon filling in form but have not saved
excerpt:
Hi, 
I have a case that our user is filling form but s/he has not saved and submitted yet but somehow her/his laptop battery died so s/he lost all answers. Is there any way Monday allows to keep track answers for unsubmi…

posts.author: khoanghuy79 (Huy)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi,

I have a case that our user is filling form but s/he has not saved and submitted yet but somehow her/his laptop battery died so s/he lost all answers. Is there any way Monday allows to keep track answers for unsubmitted ones or recovered those answers?

Thanks for your help

posts.author: GCavin (Gilles Cavin - Reinventing Formulas in monday.com)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @khoanghuy79,

If it’s not been submitted, the answers were never sent to Monday, so there is nothing they can be recover…
